name: mobile-goto
title: Drive a mobile base to a waypoint
summary: A VELOCITY-action-space skill for a mobile base: propose a 2D velocity toward the goal, bounded by a speed + acceleration envelope. Proves the contract spans morphologies and action spaces — same negotiation, same safety principle, different bounds.

post: base within tolerance of the goal
invariants: no per-tick velocity change exceeds max_accel_norm
